items.title: Valve says 5,863 games made $100K+ on Steam in 2025, up from ~3,000 titles that reached that mark in 2020, and Steam passed 42M peak concurrent users last month (Chris Kerr/Game Developer)
items.title_original: Valve says 5,863 games made $100K+ on Steam in 2025, up from ~3,000 titles that reached that mark in 2020, and Steam passed 42M peak concurrent users last month (Chris Kerr/Game Developer)
items.title_en: Valve says 5,863 games made $100K+ on Steam in 2025, up from ~3,000 titles that reached that mark in 2020, and Steam passed 42M peak concurrent users last month (Chris Kerr/Game Developer)
items.title_zh: Valve 表示，2025 年将有 5,863 款游戏在 Steam 上赚取超过 10 万美元的收入，而 2020 年达到这一水平的游戏数量约为 3,000 款，而且 Steam 上个月的并发用户峰值超过了 4200 万（Chris Kerr/游戏开发者）
items.title_bilingual: Valve 表示，2025 年将有 5,863 款游戏在 Steam 上赚取超过 10 万美元的收入，而 2020 年达到这一水平的游戏数量约为 3,000 款，而且 Steam 上个月的并发用户峰值超过了 4200 万（Chris Kerr/游戏开发者） / Valve says 5,863 games made $100K+ on Steam in 2025, up from ~3,000 titles that reached that mark in 2020, and Steam passed 42M peak concurrent users last month (Chris Kerr/Game Developer)

items.title: Spotify says artists from 75 countries made $500K+ in royalties in 2025, up from 66 in 2024; ~50% of an average artist's streams came from outside their country (Ethan Millman/The Hollywood Reporter)

items.title_en: Spotify says artists from 75 countries made $500K+ in royalties in 2025, up from 66 in 2024; ~50% of an average artist's streams came from outside their country (Ethan Millman/The Hollywood Reporter)
items.title_zh: Spotify 表示，到 2025 年，来自 75 个国家的艺术家的版税收入将超过 50 万美元，高于 2024 年的 66 个国家；平均约 50% 的艺术家直播来自国外（Ethan Millman/好莱坞报道）
items.title_bilingual: Spotify 表示，到 2025 年，来自 75 个国家的艺术家的版税收入将超过 50 万美元，高于 2024 年的 66 个国家；平均约 50% 的艺术家直播来自国外（Ethan Millman/好莱坞报道） / Spotify says artists from 75 countries made $500K+ in royalties in 2025, up from 66 in 2024; ~50% of an average artist's streams came from outside their country (Ethan Millman/The Hollywood Reporter)

items.title_en: Amsterdam-based Nebius says Nvidia plans to invest $2B in the startup as it plans to build AI data centers and deploy 5GW+ of Nvidia systems by the end of 2030 (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 总部位于阿姆斯特丹的 Nebius 表示 Nvidia 计划向这家初创公司投资 20 亿美元，因为该公司计划在 2030 年底前建设人工智能数据中心并部署 5GW 以上的 Nvidia 系统（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 总部位于阿姆斯特丹的 Nebius 表示 Nvidia 计划向这家初创公司投资 20 亿美元，因为该公司计划在 2030 年底前建设人工智能数据中心并部署 5GW 以上的 Nvidia 系统（彭博社） / Amsterdam-based Nebius says Nvidia plans to invest $2B in the startup as it plans to build AI data centers and deploy 5GW+ of Nvidia systems by the end of 2030 (Bloomberg)
